race.comment: FLITGROVE (7) is a former Victorian who has run well at both runs for the new yard and will find this easier. Well placed here and drawn to push forward with Kendall back in the saddle. First try here but will take catching off the low draw. SPIRITOF THE OCEAN (8) placed fresh then headed north to Rockhampton and just missed when runner-up. Has placed third-up and is going well. Should be in the finish. HEADLINE LEGEND (9) returns from a break and did win the maiden here when last resuming. Drawn for a soft run and expected to measure up. MISSY'S READY (10) broke a long drought last time when she scored by 0.6 lengths at Warwick over 800m. Can go on with it.
